title: melittis carpatica var. subcordata
intro: Melittis carpatica var. subcordata, also known as the bee orchid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Melittis genus. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Melittis carpatica var. subcordata include reducing inflammation and relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and immunomodulatory effects. The plant is traditionally prepared as a tea, tincture, or extract, which can be used to treat various health conditions, and its flowers can be used to make herbal infusions and salves.
